info.title: CRAFT-ON API
info.description: Backend for CRAFT-ON — on-demand spot matching for construction tradespeople in Japan (Phase 1 MVP). See the crafton repo docs.

get.description: Liveness: the process is up. No dependencies checked.
Readiness: can we reach the database? Returns 503 if not.

post.description: Register on first login (OTP + role + credentials) or return the existing user.

Set/replace the caller's password.

Gated behind ``require_active`` so a suspended account cannot establish or
rotate credentials.

Returning login: username / email / phone + password → a session token.

SMS OTP is only used at registration; this path is OTP-free and works in every
environment (the API issues its own signed token — see core.session_token).

SECURITY — before exposing this widely, add per-identifier + per-IP rate
limiting / lockout on failed attempts (config-driven) and consider binding
tokens to the device record so revocation invalidates them server-side.

Forgot-password recovery. The client re-verifies the phone by SMS OTP; the
OTP token here proves phone ownership, so we set a new password on the
matching account and return a fresh session token (logged in). No old
password required — SMS is the proof of identity, consistent with the
OTP-at-confirmation-only model (ADR 0009).

patch.description:
Change the caller's login identifiers (username and/or email) from account
settings. Each is uniqueness-checked (excluding the caller) → clean 409.

schema.title: Response List My Documents Api V1 Documents Me Get

get.description:
Short-lived signed read URL for a document's bytes. The owner can view
their own documents; admins can view any (vetting). The bytes are served by
Cloud Storage via the signed URL — never proxied through the API.

A worker's public portfolio photos (signed read URLs). Visible to any
approved user — the same audience as the public worker profile. Only
`job_photo` documents; identity documents are never exposed here.

schema.title: Response Worker Public Photos Api V1 Workers  User Id  Photos Get
Response Search Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get
Response My Jobs Api V1 Jobs Mine Get
Response List Saved Jobs Api V1 Jobs Saved Get
Response List Saved Job Ids Api V1 Jobs Saved Ids Get

get.description:
Signed read URLs for a posting's attached photos. Any approved user who
can see the job can see its photos (unlike private documents, which stay
owner/admin-only).

schema.title: Response Job Photos Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Photos Get
Response List Applicants Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Applications Get
Response My Applications Api V1 Applications Mine Get
Response My Matchings Api V1 Matchings Mine Get
Response List Messages Api V1 Matchings  Matching Id  Messages Get
Response Worker Reviews Api V1 Workers  User Id  Reviews Get
Response Contractor Reviews Api V1 Contractors  User Id  Reviews Get
Response List Notifications Api V1 Notifications Get
Response My Devices Api V1 Me Devices Get
Response Admin List Devices Api V1 Admin Devices Get

get.description:
Active trades for the pickers. Available to any signed-in user (the
onboarding form runs before approval).

schema.title: Response List Trades Api V1 Trades Get
Response Admin List Trades Api V1 Admin Trades Get

get.description:
Free-text trade values users invented (not in the catalog), with usage
counts — the merge worklist.

schema.title: Response Admin Custom Trades Api V1 Admin Trades Custom Get

get.description: All users with profile + documents (full admin visibility).

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Admin Jobs Get
Response List Admins Api V1 Admin Admins Get
Response List Matchings Api V1 Admin Matchings Get

AccountUpdateIn.title: AccountUpdateIn
AccountUpdateIn.description:
Change login identifiers (username and/or email) from account settings.

Both fields are optional; only the provided ones change. Normalized and
uniqueness-checked exactly like registration.

AdminCreateIn.title: AdminCreateIn
AdminCreateIn.description: Create a new admin account (logs in with identifier + password).

ApplicantOut.title: ApplicantOut
ApplicantOut.description: Applicant view for the contractor (worker summary embedded).

ConfigOut.title: ConfigOut
ConfigOut.description: Resolved config/flags snapshot (runtime override > env > default).

CustomTradeOut.title: CustomTradeOut
CustomTradeOut.description: A free-text trade value found on profiles/jobs that isn't in the catalog.

DebugSeedIn.title: DebugSeedIn
DebugSeedIn.description: How many random records to create (debug/non-prod only).

DocumentWithUrlOut.title: DocumentWithUrlOut
DocumentWithUrlOut.description: Document plus a signed read URL (admin vetting / owner view).

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: The uniform error envelope returned for non-2xx responses.

JobPhotoOut.title: JobPhotoOut
JobPhotoOut.description: A posting photo: document reference + short-lived signed read URL.

LoginIn.title: LoginIn
LoginIn.description: Returning login: username, email, or phone number + password.

LoginOut.title: LoginOut
LoginOut.description: An app session token + the signed-in user.

PasswordResetIn.title: PasswordResetIn
PasswordResetIn.description:
Reset the password for the phone number proven by the OTP token in the
request (forgot-password flow). SMS OTP confirms phone ownership; no old
password is needed.

SessionCreateIn.title: SessionCreateIn
SessionCreateIn.description:
Body for ``POST /auth/session``.

On first login the user row is created: a role and login credentials
(username, email, password) are required. On subsequent logins the body is
optional (an existing user is simply returned).

SetPasswordIn.title: SetPasswordIn
SetPasswordIn.description: Set/replace the current user's password (for OTP-free returning logins).

TradeMergeIn.title: TradeMergeIn
TradeMergeIn.description:
Merge a free-text trade value into a catalog trade: every occurrence on
worker profiles and jobs is rewritten to the catalog trade's canonical
name (deduplicated).

WorkHistoryEntry.title: WorkHistoryEntry
WorkHistoryEntry.description:
A single past job in a worker's 職歴 (career history).

Used for both input and output. Kept permissive (no min_length) so a stored
row never fails OUT-serialization; the web/service drop blank-company rows on
write.

WorkHistoryOut.title: WorkHistoryOut
WorkHistoryOut.description: A worker's completed-work record + headline totals (informational).

WorkerPublicOut.title: WorkerPublicOut
WorkerPublicOut.description:
Public worker profile (docs/06). Excludes PII (legal name, kana, email);
current employer appears only when the worker opted to make it public.

HTTPBearer.description: App session token (or, at registration, a Firebase ID token)
